situation_summary: Champion left the company, renewal at risk 60 days out. DAU dropped 40%. No exec sponsor engaged.
action_taken: Executive business review with new CTO. ROI analysis presented. New champion identified and enabled.
outcome: Renewed with 15% expansion ($18K). New champion emerged. Health score recovered to 74.
csm_notes: EBR was the turning point. Lead with owned accountability, then present quantified ROI. Executive sponsorship from CTO was critical. Ensure exec-level contacts for at-risk accounts.
